title: Ensure signal validation happens first in pod kill
body:
This fixes an error in the system tests, which expect that when you try and kill a nonexistent pod with an incorrect signal, you receive an error about the signal, not the pod.

At the same time, fix a missing return statement in the bindings, which could also have caused us grief.

Fixes #6540

@edsantiago got time for a quick eyeball?

@TomSweeneyRedHat I already gave it a once-over; did not feel comfortable LGTM'ing because I don't know `ParseSignal`, can't easily chase down the `syscall.Signal` type, so I don't know the type of `sig` in the debug statement, and could not confirm that `%d` was appropriate. Apart from that, everything looks perfect to me.
